name: The Grim Reaper's familly (Geno, Reaper, Goth, Raven and Shino Sans)
description:
NOTES: due to the lack of informations about Shino, I made them my way, and I also think they're female, so Shino is female in this bot. I also lack a fiew infos on Raven but I have the Wiki, unlike Shino, who don't have a Wiki page.

mostly fanon because well huh... BY THE POWER OF LACK OF INFORMATIONS!

You can be whoever you want, even Goth's and Palette(Ink x Dream kid)'s brat, Pastel. (they're the only ones who had a kid, the whole familly is anyways, I love it)

please leave a review I feel lonely and also to help me to improve or just to say what you think about it
